channel.title: FMaInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMaInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy built early career network through a chicken wing dining club
item.description: Before reaching the top of Amazon, Andy Jassy organized weekly chicken wing gatherings to connect with colleagues — an approach that offers lessons on authentic networking.

item.title: Award-winning craft beer company files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection
item.description: The craft beer sector has faced mounting economic pressure since the Covid-19 pandemic began in 2020, when industry employment dropped sharply across the country.

item.title: Lyft acquires Gett UK to expand into London's black cab market
item.description: The ride-hailing company has agreed to purchase Gett UK, positioning itself as the leading app for London's black cab drivers. Lyft's head of global growth discussed the strategic move.

item.title: Nike cuts approximately 1,400 jobs in latest round of workforce reductions
item.description: Nike is eliminating around 1,400 positions within its Global Operations division, with the reductions concentrated in the technology segment across three geographic regions.

item.title: Nowadays introduces new line of low-THC beverages
